arts.ttl: John Eustace issues injury update as Derby County duo face Portsmouth battle
arts.sum: Both players did not train today ahead of the trip to Fratton Park on Saturday (3pm) where Derby will look for a result that keeps them out of the Championship's bottom three. Sondre Langas and Callum Elder are both "touch and go" for Derby County's trip to Portsmouth at the weekend.

arts.sum: The finishing line is coming into view in the Championship but there remains plenty to play for as Aaron Ashley previews all 12 games in the second tier this weekend.
